info.title: FarmersQuest API
info.description: Backend API for the FarmersQuest agricultural marketplace.

post.summary: Register a buyer account. Username is optional and derived from the email when omitted.
Register a farmer account. Username is optional and derived from the email when omitted. NIN and KYC are completed later at verification. The farmer starts unverified.
Log in with email or username and password.
Log out, revoking the current access token.
Request a password reset link. Always succeeds.
Set a new password using a reset token.

get.summary: View your own profile, including verification status for farmers.

put.summary: Update your own name and phone number.

post.summary: Change your password. The current password is required.
Submit KYC: a government ID type, front and back images, a farmer photo, a date of birth, and the NIN.

get.summary: List farmers awaiting verification, oldest first. Admin only.
Review a farmer's KYC submission, with the decrypted NIN and date of birth. Admin only.
Fetch one KYC document image (front, back, or photo) for review. Admin only.

post.summary: Suspend a farmer so they can no longer sell. An optional reason is recorded.
Approve a farmer's KYC, moving them to verified. An optional note is recorded.
Reject a farmer's KYC with a reason, so they can fix it and resubmit.

get.summary: View my cart, with each line validated and priced live from the catalog.

post.summary: Add a product to my cart, or increase its quantity when already present.

put.summary: Set the quantity of a line in my cart.

delete.summary: Remove a line from my cart.

get.summary: Search and browse products. Use featured=true for the featured list, or verifiedOnly=true for verified farmers only.
The category tree with subcategories and a live product count per node.
Full product detail with gallery, attributes, related products, and more from the farmer.
A paged list of a product's reviews, newest first.
The list of Nigerian states for the header selector and location filter.

post.summary: Check my cart out into an order. Send an Idempotency-Key header so a retry is safe.

get.summary: View one of my orders, with each sub-order's status.

post.summary: Mark a shipped sub-order as delivered.
Development only: simulate payment to move an order to Paid and decrement stock.
Cancel a sub-order before it ships, as the owning buyer or farmer.

get.summary: List my incoming orders, newest first.
View one of my incoming sub-orders, with the actions I can take now.

post.summary: Mark a paid sub-order as preparing.
Mark a preparing sub-order as shipped.

Bearer.description: Paste a JWT access token. The Authorize button sends it as a bearer token.
